_comment: App-wide branding — read by the desktop downloader to brand the packaged Electron build (Info.plist CFBundle* fields). Also the canonical source for the app's user-facing name; index.html and other surfaces should align with these strings.
name: Updraft
_remoteOriginNote: Canonical deploy URL where models live. lib/fetch-progress.js falls back to this when a built-in model URL 404s locally (typical of desktop builds where the user didn't bundle every model). Trailing slash required. Update when the deploy path changes.
